## Checklist

- [ ] Follows existing code patterns and conventions
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets, IPs, or credentials
- [ ] Backend tests pass (`python3 manage.py test --no-input`)
- [ ] User-facing strings are in locale files (all 6 languages)
- [ ] Screenshots included (if UI changes)
- [ ] I have read and agree to the [CLA](CLA.md) (first-time contributors)
